project.component: { "keyToString": { "Cucumber Java.Scenario: .executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Contact Validation for Factorial Endpoint.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Error message text matches what UI expects.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of 0 returns 1.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of 1 returns 1.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of 171 returns null instead of a valid integer — BUG-003.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of 171 should not return Infinity — BUG-003.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of large positive integers returns a valid finite integer.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of large positive integers.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of lowest positive integer.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of small positive integers returns correct result.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of small positive integers.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: GET request should be rejected with 405 Method Not Allowed — BUG-005.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Invalid parameter type returns an error response.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Missing parameter should return HTTP 400 — BUG-004.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Missing required number parameter returns an error response.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Negative integer should return an error — BUG-001.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Response Content-Type is always application/json.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Submitting an invalid value returns an error in the answer field.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Test1.executor": "Run", "Cucumber Java.Scenario: Unsupported HTTP methods should be rejected with 405 Method Not Allowed.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", component.name: RunManager
component.selected: Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of lowest positive integer

configuration.name: Scenario: Factorial of large positive integers returns a valid finite integer

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Factorial of large positive integers returns a valid finite integer$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Factorial of large positive integers returns a valid finite integer$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Factorial of large positive integers returns a valid finite integer

configuration.name: Scenario: Factorial of lowest positive integer

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Factorial of lowest positive integer

configuration.name: Scenario: Invalid parameter type returns an error response

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Invalid parameter type returns an error response$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Invalid parameter type returns an error response$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Invalid parameter type returns an error response

configuration.name: Scenario: Missing required number parameter returns an error response

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Missing required number parameter returns an error response$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Missing required number parameter returns an error response$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Missing required number parameter returns an error response

configuration.name: Scenario: Unsupported HTTP methods should be rejected with 405 Method Not Allowed

option.name: NAME_FILTER
option.value: ^Unsupported HTTP methods should be rejected with 405 Method Not Allowed$

option.name: PROGRAM_PARAMETERS
option.value: --plugin teamcity --name "^Unsupported HTTP methods should be rejected with 405 Method Not Allowed$"

option.name: SUGGESTED_NAME
option.value: Scenario: Unsupported HTTP methods should be rejected with 405 Method Not Allowed

item.itemvalue: Cucumber Java.Scenario: Factorial of lowest positive integer
